question: How frequently does Northbeam perform user access reviews?
reference_answer: Northbeam performs user access reviews at least every 90 days [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam performs user access reviews at least every 90 days.
must_support.supporting_quote: User access reviews are performed on a periodic basis aligned with the risk of each role, without a fixed interval.

must_not_assert: Northbeam performs user access reviews at least every 90 days.
